message:
fix: use $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR for hooks path resolution (v3.5.15)

Replace relative paths and $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) with
$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR in all hook commands. Fixes hooks breaking when
Claude Code changes working directory to a subdirectory.

- .claude/settings.json: 15 hook paths updated
- v3/@claude-flow/cli/.claude/settings.json: 9 hook paths updated
- settings-generator.ts: hookHandlerCmd, autoMemoryCmd, statusline fixed
- All three packages bumped to 3.5.15 and published

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "claude-flow",
-  "version": "3.5.14",
+  "version": "3.5.15",
   "description": "Ruflo - Enterprise AI agent orchestration for Claude Code. Deploy 60+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus, vector memory, and MCP integration",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "type": "module",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "ruflo",
-  "version": "3.5.14",
+  "version": "3.5.15",
   "description": "Ruflo - Enterprise AI agent orchestration platform. Deploy 60+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus, vector memory, and MCP integration",
   "main": "bin/ruflo.js",
   "type": "module",

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs pre-bash",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" pre-bash",
             "timeout": 5000
           }
         ]
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs post-edit",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" post-edit",
             "timeout": 10000
           }
         ]
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs route",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" route",
             "timeout": 10000
           }
         ]
@@ -46,13 +46,13 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs session-restore",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" session-restore",
             "timeout": 15000,
             "continueOnError": true
           },
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/auto-memory-hook.mjs import",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/auto-memory-hook.mjs" import",
             "timeout": 8000,
             "continueOnError": true
           }
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs session-end",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" session-end",
             "timeout": 10000,
             "continueOnError": true
           }
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs status",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/hook-handler.cjs" status",
             "timeout": 3000,
             "continueOnError": true
           }
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@
         "hooks": [
           {
             "type": "command",
-            "command": "node .claude/helpers/auto-memory-hook.mjs sync",
+            "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/auto-memory-hook.mjs" sync",
             "timeout": 10000,
             "continueOnError": true
           }
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@
   },
   "statusLine": {
     "type": "command",
-    "command": "node .claude/helpers/statusline.cjs",
+    "command": "node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/helpers/statusline.cjs"",
     "refreshMs": 5000,
     "enabled": true
   },

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "@claude-flow/cli",
-  "version": "3.5.14",
+  "version": "3.5.15",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Ruflo CLI - Enterprise AI agent orchestration with 60+ specialized agents, swarm coordination, MCP server, self-learning hooks, and vector memory for Claude Code",
